hero.subtitle: A front-end developer who loves clean design, smooth interactions, and building products that make a difference.
about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I'm a full-stack developer who loves building complete digital products — from polished, interactive interfaces to scalable APIs and databases.
about.bio2: My stack includes React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Flask and PostgreSQL. I'm also a big fan of Linux. I'm comfortable working across the entire stack and enjoy turning complex ideas into working, deployed applications.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new Linux distros, contributing to open source, or diving into the latest tech trends.
skills.title: Skills & Tools
projects.title: Featured Projects

projects.items.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.items.description: A real-time admin panel with sales charts, dark mode, and role-based access control for managing products and orders.

projects.items.title: Task Manager API
projects.items.description: A production-grade RESTful API with JWT authentication, task CRUD operations, team collaboration, and real-time updates.

projects.items.title: Portfolio Website
projects.items.description: This very site! A minimal, responsive portfolio built with modern tools and a focus on clean design and performance.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or just a friendly chat about tech. Feel free to reach out!
